title: MAI-Thinking-1: Building a Hill-Climbing Machine
abstract: This technical report introduces MAI-Thinking-1, a 35B active / 1T total parameter sparse MoE reasoning model developed from scratch by Microsoft AI. The report frames model development as a system-level hill-climbing machine combining scaling-focused pre-training decisions, clean enterprise-grade data, reinforcement learning recipes, long-running RL infrastructure, evaluation suites, safety training, and red teaming.
publication_status: Microsoft AI technical report / PDF release.
